the diagram models a system with classes representing users, events, cities, and points of interest.
users can create events.
events are associated with a city.
points of interest are also associated with a city.
the diagram focuses on the relationships between these core entities.

flow 2: avvio app -> utente registrato con successo al servizio? (no) -> creazione di un nuovo utente -> utente loggato correttamente?
the diagram models a login/registration process for an application.
the process starts with launching the app and checks if the user is already registered.
if not registered, a new user is created.
after registration or if already registered, the system checks if the user logs in correctly.
upon successful login, the user is directed to the homepage.
the diagram shows two main paths: registration and login.
avvio app -> fase di login / registrazione — type=transition; label=""; explanation="start of the process"
fase di login / registrazione -> utente è loggato? — type=transition; label=""; explanation="after login/registration"
utente è loggato? -> avvio app — type=transition; label="no"; explanation="if the user is not logged in"
utente è loggato? -> e nella schermata di visualizzazione di una città — type=transition; label="si"; explanation="if the user is logged in"

i campi sono corretti? -> evento creato — type=transition; label="si"; explanation="if the fields are correct"
i campi sono corretti? -> compila i form — type=transition; label="no"; explanation="if the fields are not correct"

flow 1: avvio app -> fase di login / registrazione -> utente è loggato? (si) -> e nella schermata di visualizzazione di una città -> scorrere in basso e premere "+" per aggiungere un evento -> compila i form -> i campi sono corretti? (si) -> evento creato
the diagram models the process of creating an event within an application.
the process begins with either logging in or registering.
if the user is not logged in, the process returns to the login/registration phase.
after successful login, the user navigates to a city view and then initiates the event creation process.
the event creation involves filling a form, which is validated to ensure all fields are correct.
if the fields are incorrect, the user is prompted to re-enter the information.
avvio app -> fase di login/registrazione — type=control_flow; label=""; explanation="start of the process leads to login/registration"

utente è loggato? — type=decision; label="no"; explanation="if the user is not logged in"
utente è loggato? — type=decision; label="si"; explanation="if the user is logged in"
